title: OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT EAST COUNTY HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers breast or cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 600 NE 8th Street 3rd Floor Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) regardless of gender -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services regardless of gender -Must live or intend to live in Oregon -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 988-5558 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-5558 Screenwise (971) 673-0581 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 1, 4, 9, 25, 26, 80; MAX Blue Line to Gresham Central Transit Center Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE CLINICS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT EAST COUNTY HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL
